case_title: MARTIN, STANFORD R, AS CO-TRUSTEES OF THE STANFORD vs. PIPESON, GREGORY et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MARTIN, STANFORD R, AS CO-TRUSTEES OF THE STANFORDR. MARTIN AND EMILY G. MARTIN 1986 REVOCABLE TRUST

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, STANFORD R, AS CO-TRUSTEES OF THE STANFORDR. MARTIN AND EMILY G. MARTIN 1986 REVOCABLE TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIPESON, GREGORY PIPESON, MARY C. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 335 YERBA BUENA AVENUE $5,500.00 RENT, $875.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,665.00, LEASE FORFEITED, STIPULATED-- SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $1,165.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE JAN-05-1995, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN, STANFORD R, AS CO-TRUSTEES OF THE STANFORDR. MARTIN AND EMILY G. MARTIN 1986 REVOCABLE TRUST

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN, STANFORD R, AS CO-TRUSTEES OF THE STANFORDR. MARTIN AND EMILY G. MARTIN 1986 REVOCABLE TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT PIPESON, GREGORY PIPESON, MARY C. DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
